name: Vertin / Betaserc
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
how_it_works: Histamine H1 agonist and H3 receptor antagonist that improves microcirculation in the inner ear by dilating precapillary sphincters and reducing endolymphatic pressure.
food_interactions: Take with food to reduce GI upset
what_to_avoid: Long-term treatment often needed for Meniere's disease
Not for acute attacks of severe vertigo
